local.description: Primary local front door for Windows and release validation

github-pages.description: Static public mirror for read-only surfaces
github-pages.notes: Static mirror only; private journal and operator data stay local.

mirrorPolicy: Local npm runtime is canonical. Public URLs are read-only mirrors and must be verified before they are treated as live.

frontDoorValidation.candidate: Route is planned or configured but has no current health evidence.
frontDoorValidation.verified: Route responds to health checks and serves the expected surface.

cloudMirrors.name: Lantern OS GitHub Pages
cloudMirrors.notes: Dream Journal static page. App server features require local npm runtime.
